Command line to reproduce this simulation:
/home/user/daniel/MonoAlg3D_C/bin/MonoAlg3D -c ./teste_cabo_tuneCV.ini 
For reproducibility purposes the configuration file was copied to file: /home/user/daniel/MonoAlg3D_C/cable/original_configuration.ini
